name: PT Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk
city:
Jl. Lodan Timur 7 Jakarta, Indonesia
 Ancol
owner:
Government of Jakarta (72%)

description: Taman Impian Jaya Ancol also known as Ancol Dreamland is an integral part of Ancol Bay City, a resort destination located along Jakarta's waterfront, in Ancol (Kelurahan), Pademangan, North Jakarta.  It is owned by PT.  Pembangunan Jaya Ancol Tbk, a subsidiary of Pembangunan Jaya Group.
